## Summary

Describe the defect in one or two sentences.

## Affected Area

Examples:

- Home
- Chat
- Documents
- Operations
- Agents
- Admin
- Settings
- API
- Worker
- Retrieval
- Auth
- Runtime governance

1.

## Expected Result

Describe what should have happened.

## Actual Result

Describe what actually happened.

## Scope Context

If relevant, include:

- tenant
- workspace
- knowledge base
- selected document
- selected workflow run
- selected agent definition

## Environment

Examples:

- local Docker stack
- local web-only run
- API-only run

## Notes

Add logs, screenshots, or extra context if needed.
